summary: Surah Hud delivers warnings and glad tidings, recounting the stories of past prophets and their peoples, including Noah, Hud, Saleh, Abraham, Lut, and Shuaib. The surah emphasizes the consequences of disbelief, arrogance, and injustice, while highlighting the mercy and forgiveness granted to the patient and repentant. It urges steadfastness, the establishment of prayer, and trust in Allah, warning against inclining toward oppressors and reminding that every soul will be repaid in full for its deeds on the Day of Judgment.
